zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Maxwell於1345年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可時，他的父親John Maxwell35歲，母親Christian Erskine30歲。他於大約1363年與Lady Jonet Forrester I在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可結婚。他去世於1410年2月8日在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Maxwell于1345年出生在苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可时，他的父亲John Maxwell35岁，母亲Christian Erskine30岁。他于大约1363年与Lady Jonet Forrester I在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可结婚。他去世于1410年2月8日在英国苏格兰度福利爾凱爾拉維洛可享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Maxwell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from a place in Kelso, near Melrose in Roxburghshire, the name of a salmon pool on the Tweed near Kelso Bridge. The placename is first recorded in 1144 in the form Mackeswell ‘Mack's spring or stream’ (Old English well(a)).
Irish: adopted for Ó Meisceall, see Miskell . This surname is common in Ulster.
Jewish: arbitrary adoption of the Scottish name, or Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Miskell
meanings: Irish (Galway): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Meisceall ‘descendant of Meiscill’, a personal name of unexplained etymology. Sometimes Anglicized as Maxwell .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Maxwell was born in 1345, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, John Maxwell, was 35 and his mother, Christian Erskine, was 30. He married Lady Jonet Forrester I about 1363, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. He died on 8 February 1410, in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Maxwell est né en 1345, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, John Maxwell, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Christian Erskine, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Lady Jonet Forrester I environ 1363, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 8 février 1410, à Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Maxwell 1345 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Maxwell 35 und seine Mutter Christian Erskine 30. Er hat um 1363 in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Lady Jonet Forrester I geheiratet. Er starb am 8. Februar 1410 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Maxwell è nato il nel 1345 nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, John Maxwell, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Christian Erskine, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Lady Jonet Forrester I circa 1363, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì il 8 febbraio 1410, nel Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Maxwellが1345年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで生まれた時，父John Maxwellは35歳，母Christian Erskineは30歳であった。約1363年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックでLady Jonet Forrester Iと結婚した。彼は1410年2月8日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアケエルラバーオックで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Maxwell(이)가 1345년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Maxwell(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Christian Erskine(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 Lady Jonet Forrester I(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1410년 2월 8일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 카이를레이베록에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Maxwell nasceu em 1345, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Maxwell, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Christian Erskine, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Jonet Forrester I aproximadamente 1363, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 8 de fevereiro de 1410, em Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Maxwell родился в 1345 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John Maxwell было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Christian Erskine, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Jonet Forrester I около 1363 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер 8 февраля 1410 г. в местности каирлавирокк, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Maxwell nació en 1345, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, John Maxwell, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Christian Erskine, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lady Jonet Forrester I aproximadamente 1363, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió el 8 de febrero de 1410, en Caerlaverock, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 65 años.
